rule_metadata.name: unshackle
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'unshackle' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule unshackle
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'unshackle' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "unshackle"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "/bin/unshackle"
		$string2 = /\/unshackle\.git/
		$string3 = /\/unshackle\.modules/
		$string4 = "Fadi002/unshackle"
		$string5 = "unshackle --"
		$string6 = "unshackle-main"
		$string7 = /unshackle\-v1\.0\.iso/

	condition:
		any of them
}
